partners.description: Binance is the largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume, serving 185M+ usrs across 180+ countries.

partners.name: Bitget

partners.name: Bybit

partners.description: Ceres Farm is a leveraged yield farming protocol built on Pendle PT markets.

partners.name: Contango
partners.description: Contango builds positions by automating looping strategies through flash loans. When a trader opens a position, the protocol borrows on money markets.

partners.name: DeFi Saver
partners.description: DeFi Saver is an all-in-one management tool for DeFi protocols such as Aave, Compound, Fluid, Morpho, Sky and more.

partners.name: Dolomite
partners.description: Dolomite is a next-generation decentralized money market protocol and  DEX that offers broad token support and capital efficiency with its virtual liquidity system.

partners.name: Euler

partners.name: FiRM

partners.name: Gate.io
partners.description: Established in 2013, Gate.io has consistently ranked among the top 10 exchanges.  It is a full-service digital asset exchange platform covering million of users around the world

partners.name: Gearbox

partners.name: HyperLend

partners.name: infiniFi

partners.name: INFINIT
partners.description: Navigate DeFi with INFINIT - Discover, evaluate, and execute DeFi with AI agents.

partners.name: InsurACE

partners.name: Lagoon

partners.name: Morpho
